content:
---

3. Personalization

• Assess how the system adapts content or layout to individual users.
• Suggest data sources and algorithms (e.g. clustering, reinforcement learning) to deepen personalization.
• Outline a strategy for user profiling, dynamic content selection, and privacy safeguards.


---

4. Generative Capabilities

• Review the generative techniques in use (e.g. GPT, GAN, procedural methods).
• Propose enhancements or alternative models to boost creativity, coherence, or diversity.
• Provide sample prompts, training-data ideas, or model‐architecture sketches to illustrate your approach.


---

5. Technical Feasibility & Scalability

• Identify potential performance bottlenecks, security risks, or integration challenges.
• Recommend tools, frameworks, or architecture patterns to mitigate these risks.
• Prioritize your suggestions by estimated effort versus impact, and map out next-step prototypes or proof-of-concepts.
context: From document: AI Review & Expansion Prompt: — chunk 2 (chunk 2/25)
